---
title: "Meta-Analysis: Supplementary Materials"
type: "Supplementary"
author: "[Gianmarco Altoè](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=-N7efdEAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)"
---

<br>

Materiali aggiuntivi relativi alle meta-analisi.

<a href="supplementary/book_Borenstein_2009.pdf" download="book_Borenstein_2009.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Libro sulle Meta-Analisi - Borenstein, 2009 (pdf)
</a>

<a href="supplementary/borenstein_paper_2023.pdf" download="borenstein_paper_2023.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  "Heterogeneity in meta-analysis" - Borenstein, 2023 (pdf)
</a>
